title: Multiply with 8
essential_question: What strategies can you use to multiply with 8?

learn.title: Strategy: Double the ×4 Fact
learn.content: Since 8 = 2 × 4, every ×8 fact is just double the ×4 fact. 8 × 6 = (4 × 6) × 2 = 24 × 2 = 48.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.8 'Multiply with 8' pp.167-170
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic E — Multiplying with the Unit of 8
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Strategy: Double-Double-Double
learn.content: Since 8 = 2 × 2 × 2, you can double three times. 8 × 7: double 7 → 14, double 14 → 28, double 28 → 56.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.8 'Multiply with 8' pp.167-170
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic E — Multiplying with the Unit of 8
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Strategy: Break 8 into 5 + 3
learn.content: Use the Distributive Property: 8 × 7 = (5 × 7) + (3 × 7) = 35 + 21 = 56. Pick whichever split you remember best.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.8 'Multiply with 8' pp.167-170
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic E — Multiplying with the Unit of 8
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Every ×8 Product Is Even
learn.content: 8 is even, so every ×8 product is even. They also all end in 0, 2, 4, 6, or 8 — look at the ×8 row: 8, 16, 24, 32, 40, 48, 56, 64, 72, 80.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.8 'Multiply with 8' pp.167-170
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic E — Multiplying with the Unit of 8
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Double-Double-Double — ×8 가장 강력한 전략
learn.content: 8 = 2 × 2 × 2이므로 ×8 = 더블 세 번. 예: 8 × 6 = 6 → 12 → 24 → 48 (더블 3회). 단계: 다른 인자 a를 골라 — 더블(2a) → 더블(4a) → 더블(8a). 장점: 작은 더블 3번이 큰 ×8 한 번보다 정확함. 예: 8 × 7 = 7 → 14 → 28 → 56. 흔한 실수: 두 번만 더블해서 ×4 답 (28)을 ×8 답으로 잘못 보고.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.4 Lesson 4.8 'Multiply with 8' pp.167-170
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic E — Multiplying with the Unit of 8
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: ×8 = ×10 − ×2 (큰 수에 빠른 방법)
learn.content: 9에 가까운 큰 수와 곱할 때: 8 = 10 − 2 분해. 예: 8 × 9 = 9 × (10 − 2) = 90 − 18 = 72. 예: 8 × 7 = 7 × (10 − 2) = 70 − 14 = 56. 장점: ×10은 즉답, ×2는 더블이라 둘 다 쉬움. 검증: 두 부분 모두 빼야 함 (분배법칙) — 한 부분만 빼면 오류.

try.question: If 8 × 7 = 56, what is 8 × 8?
try.explanation: 8 × 8 is one more group of 8 than 8 × 7. 56 + 8 = 64.

practice_r2.question: Find the difference: 712 − 364.
practice_r2.explanation: 712−364: 2−4 borrow → 12−4=8; tens 0−6 borrow → 10−6=4 (after lending); hundreds 6−3=3. Result: 348.
hints: Borrow across the zero in tens.
